Title: The worm
Appearance: A large worm-like vehicle that has what seems like a drill on the end of it. It has a metallic colour to the entire body of it, looking like it's purely made of metal. Roughly 4 meters in height, and 16 in length.
Description: A man-made vehicle used to search for valuable resources and dig to them, while not causing too much damage to terrain.
Mechanic: Sensing and drilling towards valuable resources and materials.
